raw_consumer_statement: The charges placed on my card are not correct. A stray cat was taken to the XXXX XXXX XXXX  for treatment on XX/XX/XXXX by my relative, XXXX XXXX. XXXX used my card to pay for the visit and called me before signing the invoice. The XXXX  employee advised they placed a deposit of {$400.00} on my card to ensure payment as standard practice. However, we were told multiple times the deposit amount will be deducted from the final bill once service was complete. The employee came back in after evaluation and gave the estimate of {$1300.00} total and CIRCLED the amount on the invoice to show what the total bill would be. You can also verify this by looking at the documents provided by the XXXX XXXX agreed to pay the XXXX with my card and was advised that the deposit that had already been paid ( {$400.00} ) will be reversed since the total bill was paid in full. This did not happen. I was charged in full for both transactions and no deposit was returned. This is theft. The attached document shows the estimate with 2 prices, the employee told us that the cats services will total the lower amount since he would only be staying less than 48 hours and we would pick him up on Sunday XX/XX/XXXX and she circled the amount on the invoice to show which charge we were responsible for. I contacted the XXXX office 3 times about this issue and escalated to the office manager and the owner, the owner was not willing to speak with me or communicate in any way however the office manager during my phone call confirmed the deposit should have been deducted from the total invoice and this was a mistake by the office clerk who prepared the invoiced. The office manager said that she spoke with the owner and was forbidden to correct the mistake. This is outright theft and a classic bait and switch. This type of fraud is not acceptable and I can not fathom how or why CITI would allow this to happen to their own customers. The documents provided by the XXXX show the same thing my documents prove, I WAS LIED TO. If this matter is not handled by CITI appropriately and the charge REVERSED FROM MY ACCOUNT, I will be filing a complaint with the CFPB and the attorney general. I will not allow this to continue any further and you can be sure that I will never use CITI for another purchase again. I also did not sign the invoice as youll se eon the paperwork provided by the XXXX I have no legal responsibility to pay this charge, the debit is owned by XXXX XXXX, not me. CITI closed by dispute as customer responsible even thought he documents provided BY THE MERCHANT show they overcharged me. Total incompetence.
